pr.title: Record: Order-13 Full-Rescore N-gram + 11L Int6 GPTQ — val_bpb 0.0939 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11-layer gated-attention/value-residual GPT with Int6 GPTQ and a two-pass order-13 backward n-gram cache that full-rescores via entropy-adaptive mixing.
techniques: Two-pass order-13 backward n-gram cache with entropy-adaptive mixing
Int6 GPTQ with descending actorder, dead-column handling, and lzma compression
11-layer gated-attention/value-residual model with GQA and LeakyReLU(0.5)^2
